query: SELECT tn.id, tn.employeeId, tn.dataFim, tn.tipo, tn.status, e.nome as empNome FROM termination_notices tn LEFT JOIN employees e ON tn.employeeId = e.id WHERE tn.status = 'em_andamento' ORDER BY tn.dataFim ASC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT tn.id, tn.employeeId, tn.dataFim, tn.tipo, tn.status, e.nome as empNome FROM termination_notices tn LEFT JOIN employees e ON tn.employeeId = e.id WHERE tn.status = 'em_andamento' ORDER BY tn.dataFim ASC LIMIT 10
